ham.subject: Out of Office: Rahul Sharma – on leave till 15th April
ham.body:
Namaste Team,

I hope you are doing well. I am currently out of the office on vacation and will return on 15th April. During this period, I will have limited access to emails. For any urgent matters, please contact my colleague Priya Patel at priya.patel@company.com or call the office line.

Thank you for your understanding.

Best regards,
Rahul Sharma

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Crypto Wallet Suspended - Immediate Action Required
spam.body:
Dear User,

We regret to inform you that your crypto wallet has been temporarily suspended due to suspicious activity detected on your account. To reactivate your wallet and prevent permanent loss of access, you must verify your identity immediately.

Please click on the following secure link to complete the verification process: <URL>

If you do not complete the verification within 24 hours, your wallet will be permanently disabled and all associated funds will be inaccessible.

Kripya apni details verify karein aur turant action lein.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,
Crypto Security Team
